note: Instrumented live playtest, 2026-06-11. Manual loop() driving (rAF stubbed), Lv61 warrior save. Times = real CPU ms.
verdict_framePacing: Per-frame CPU is excellent under heavy load (1ms avg @55 mobs). Runtime perf is NOT the smoothness problem.
verdict_mapLoad: HEADLINE: boss-arena loads block the main thread 0.9-2.2 SECONDS (normal maps 6-50ms). Entering any boss fight = a hard multi-second freeze.
